import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; function HeroSearch() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const tomorrow = new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0]; const [form, setForm] = useState({ check_in: today, check_out: tomorrow, type: '' }); const set = (k, v) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [k]: v })); const handleSearch = () => { const params = new URLSearchParams(form).toString(); navigate(`/search?${params}`); }; return (
set('check_in', e.target.value)} />
set('check_out', e.target.value)} />
); } export default function HomePage() { return (
